results.title: Key Sens. Cruz, Cantwell look to break college sports logjam in Congress with a bipartisan bill
results.description: The senators trying to fix college sports will introduce a bipartisan bill designed to break a congressional logjam that would regulate payments to players, limit them to one “free” transfer over their careers and create a “Lane Kiffin Rule” to...
